evidence.source_title: Reza Amiri Moghadam — FBI Seeking Information
evidence.description: FBI identifies Amiri Moghadam as a senior MOIS officer who headed the ministry's operations unit.

evidence.source_title: Treasury Sanctions Additional Iranian Intelligence Officers Involved in the Probable Death and Cover-Up of Robert Levinson
evidence.description: US Treasury OFAC designation names him as a senior MOIS officer.

editorial_notes: Head of MOIS operations unit; oversaw agents in Europe.
